```{=html}
<style>#title-block-header { display: none; }
#circle-of-fifths-root { margin-top: -50px; }
#circle-of-fifths-root * { box-sizing: border-box; }

#cof-wrap {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  width: 100%;
  gap: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 2rem);
  padding: 1rem clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.5rem);
}

/* Landscape: rail of controls hugs the left margin, stacked vertically. Each select is
   sized to its own longest option (native <select> intrinsic width), not a shared column
   width, so labels never get cut off. */
#cof-rail {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 16px;
}
.side-panel { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
.side-panel label {
  font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--parch-dim); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
}
.side-panel select {
  font-size: 12px; padding: 6px 8px; border-radius: .375rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--site-border);
  background: var(--site-surface); color: var(--site-ink);
  cursor: pointer; outline: none; width: auto;
  transition: border-color .15s, box-shadow .15s;
}
.side-panel select:hover { border-color: var(--site-accent-dk); }
.side-panel select:focus-visible {
  border-color: var(--site-accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--site-accent-bg);
}
#right-panel { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity .15s; }
#right-panel.visible { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; }

#canvas-wrap { flex: 1; display: flex; justify-content: center; min-width: 0; }
#cof-canvas {
  display: block; cursor: pointer;
  width: min(100%, calc(100vh - 120px));
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  height: auto;
}

/* Portrait / narrow viewport: controls move below the wheel, laid out in a row, shifted
   right so they don't sit under the fixed bottom-left "Establish tonality" button. */
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  #circle-of-fifths-root { margin-top: -25px; }
  #cof-wrap { flex-direction: column; padding: 1rem; gap: 1rem; }
  #cof-rail {
    order: 2; width: 100%;
    flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-start;
    gap: 10px 14px;
    padding-left: 18vw;
  }
  #canvas-wrap { order: 1; width: 100%; }
  #cof-canvas { width: 100%; }
  /* Stack the shared floating button's words so it reads taller/narrower instead of
     a wide single-line strip competing with the rail for horizontal room. */
  #establish-tonality-btn {
    width: 62px; white-space: normal; text-align: center; line-height: 1.2;
  }
}
</style>

<div id="circle-of-fifths-root"><div id="cof-wrap">
  <div id="cof-rail">
    <div class="side-panel" id="left-panel">
      <label>Tonality</label>
      <select id="mode-select">
        <option value="0" selected="selected">Major (do)</option>
        <option value="1">Dorian (re)</option>
        <option value="2">Phrygian (mi)</option>
        <option value="3">Lydian (fa)</option>
        <option value="4">Mixo (so)</option>
        <option value="5">Minor (la)</option>
        <option value="7">Locrian (ti)</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="side-panel" id="right-panel">
      <label>Minor type</label>
      <select id="minor-mode">
        <option value="5">Natural (Aeolian)</option>
        <option value="6">Harmonic</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="canvas-wrap">
    <canvas id="cof-canvas" width="980" height="980"></canvas>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('cof-canvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
const CSS_SIZE = 490; // fixed logical drawing space; scaled to fit however big the canvas is actually displayed
const W = CSS_SIZE, CX = W/2, CY = W/2;

const MAX_SUPERSAMPLE = 4; // cap pinch-zoom pixel density so the backing buffer can't blow up memory
function resizeCanvas(){
  const displayed = canvas.getBoundingClientRect().width || canvas.clientWidth || CSS_SIZE;
  const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
  // Pinch/trackpad zoom scales window.visualViewport without touching devicePixelRatio or
  // firing resize/layout — it's invisible to both the media-query and ResizeObserver watchers
  // below, so it has to be read here explicitly or the canvas stays under-resolved and blurs.
  const vvScale = (window.visualViewport && window.visualViewport.scale) || 1;
  const density = Math.min(dpr * vvScale, dpr * MAX_SUPERSAMPLE);
  const backing = Math.max(1, Math.round(displayed * density));
  canvas.width = backing;
  canvas.height = backing;
  ctx.setTransform(backing / CSS_SIZE, 0, 0, backing / CSS_SIZE, 0, 0);
  draw();
}
function watchZoom(){
  window.matchMedia(`(resolution: ${window.devicePixelRatio}dppx)`)
    .addEventListener('change', function(){ resizeCanvas(); watchZoom(); }, {once:true});
}
if (window.visualViewport) window.visualViewport.addEventListener('resize', resizeCanvas);
const R_OUTER_O=235,R_OUTER_I=184,R_MID_O=182,R_MID_I=122,R_SOL_O=120,R_SOL_I=52;

const FIFTHS_LETTER_CYCLE=[3,0,4,1,5,2,6];
const LETTERS=['C','D','E','F','G','A','B'];
const LETTER_CHROMA=[0,2,4,5,7,9,11];
function buildExtendedLine(){
  const line=[];
  for(let i=0;i<29;i++){
    const li=FIFTHS_LETTER_CYCLE[i%7], acc=Math.floor(i/7)-1;
    line.push({chroma:(LETTER_CHROMA[li]+acc+120)%12, name:LETTERS[li]+['𝄫','♭','','♯','𝄪'][acc+2]});
  }
  return line;
}
const EXT_LINE=buildExtendedLine();
function buildSpellingMap(t){
  const map={};
  for(let i=t-5;i<=t+6;i++){
    if(i<0||i>=EXT_LINE.length)continue;
    const e=EXT_LINE[i]; if(!(e.chroma in map))map[e.chroma]=e.name;
  }
  return map;
}
const FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA=[0,7,2,9,4,11,6,1,8,3,10,5];
const FIFTHS_TO_EXT=[
  {sharp:8,flat:8},{sharp:9,flat:9},{sharp:10,flat:10},{sharp:11,flat:11},
  {sharp:12,flat:12},{sharp:13,flat:1},{sharp:14,flat:2},{sharp:15,flat:3},
  {sharp:16,flat:4},{sharp:17,flat:5},{sharp:18,flat:6},{sharp:7,flat:7},
];
function hasTwoSpellings(i){return FIFTHS_TO_EXT[i].sharp!==FIFTHS_TO_EXT[i].flat;}
const toggleState=FIFTHS_TO_EXT.map((e,i)=>[8,9,10].includes(i)?1:0);
function getRootExtIdx(){return toggleState[selectedRoot]===0?FIFTHS_TO_EXT[selectedRoot].sharp:FIFTHS_TO_EXT[selectedRoot].flat;}
function getSpellingMap(){return buildSpellingMap(getRootExtIdx());}
function getParentMajorExtIdx(){return getRootExtIdx()+MODES[selectedMode].fifthsOffset;}
function keySigValue(){return getParentMajorExtIdx()-8;}
function keySigLabel(){const ks=keySigValue();if(ks===0)return'♮';if(ks>0)return ks+'♯';return Math.abs(ks)+'♭';}
function getRingDisplayName(i){
  if(i===selectedRoot)return EXT_LINE[toggleState[i]===0?FIFTHS_TO_EXT[i].sharp:FIFTHS_TO_EXT[i].flat].name;
  const map=getSpellingMap();return map[FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA[i]]||EXT_LINE[FIFTHS_TO_EXT[i].sharp].name;
}
function lockSpelling(i){
  const map=getSpellingMap(), shown=map[FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA[i]]||EXT_LINE[FIFTHS_TO_EXT[i].sharp].name;
  toggleState[i]=(hasTwoSpellings(i)&&shown===EXT_LINE[FIFTHS_TO_EXT[i].flat].name)?1:0;
}

const MODES=[
  {name:'Major / Ionian', short:'Major',   tonic:'do',fifthsOffset: 0, steps:[0,2,4,5,7,9,11],qualities:['M','m','m','M','M','m','d']},
  {name:'Dorian',         short:'Dorian',  tonic:'re',fifthsOffset:-2, steps:[0,2,3,5,7,9,10],qualities:['m','m','M','M','m','d','M']},
  {name:'Phrygian',       short:'Phryg',   tonic:'mi',fifthsOffset:-4, steps:[0,1,3,5,7,8,10],qualities:['m','M','M','m','d','M','m']},
  {name:'Lydian',         short:'Lydian',  tonic:'fa',fifthsOffset: 1, steps:[0,2,4,6,7,9,11],qualities:['M','M','m','d','M','m','m']},
  {name:'Mixolydian',     short:'Mixo',    tonic:'so',fifthsOffset:-1, steps:[0,2,4,5,7,9,10],qualities:['M','m','d','M','m','m','M']},
  {name:'Natural Minor',  short:'Minor',   tonic:'la',fifthsOffset:-3, steps:[0,2,3,5,7,8,10],qualities:['m','d','M','m','m','M','M']},
  {name:'Harmonic Minor', short:'Harm.Min',tonic:'la',fifthsOffset:-3, steps:[0,2,3,5,7,8,11],qualities:['m','d','aug','m','M','M','d'],harmonic:true},
  {name:'Locrian',        short:'Locrian', tonic:'ti',fifthsOffset:-5, steps:[0,1,3,5,6,8,10],qualities:['d','M','m','m','M','M','m']},
];
const MODE_SOLFEGE=[
  ['do','re','mi','fa','so','la','ti'],
  ['re','mi','fa','so','la','ti','do'],
  ['mi','fa','so','la','ti','do','re'],
  ['fa','so','la','ti','do','re','mi'],
  ['so','la','ti','do','re','mi','fa'],
  ['la','ti','do','re','mi','fa','so'],
  ['la','ti','do','re','mi','fa','si'],
  ['ti','do','re','mi','fa','so','la'],
];
const TONIC_GROUPS={do:[0],re:[1],mi:[2],fa:[3],so:[4],la:[5,6],ti:[7]};
function resolveTonicClick(syllable){
  const group=TONIC_GROUPS[syllable]; if(!group)return;
  const idx=group.indexOf(selectedMode);
  selectedMode=idx===-1?group[0]:group[(idx+1)%group.length];
}

const HARM_MIN_QUALITIES=['m','d','aug','m','M','M','d'];
const ROMAN=['I','II','III','IV','V','VI','VII'];

// ── Characteristic chords ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Strips quality suffixes (°, +, ø, Δ) before mapping, so 'i°' → degree 0.
const ROMAN_TO_DEGREE={
  'I':0,'II':1,'III':2,'IV':3,'V':4,'VI':5,'VII':6,
  'i':0,'ii':1,'iii':2,'iv':3,'v':4,'vi':5,'vii':6,
};
function parseRomanDegree(rn){
  return ROMAN_TO_DEGREE[rn.replace(/[°+øΔ]/g,'').trim()];
}
const CHARACTERISTIC_CHORD_DEFS={
  0: ['I',  'V',   'IV' ],  // Major
  1: ['i',  'IV',  'VII'],  // Dorian
  2: ['i',  'II',  'vii'],  // Phrygian
  3: ['I',  'II',  'V'  ],  // Lydian
  4: ['I',  'IV',  'VII'],  // Mixolydian
  5: ['i',  'iv',  'VII'],  // Natural Minor (Aeolian)
  6: ['i',  'iv',  'V'  ],  // Harmonic Minor
  7: ['i°', 'iii', 'vii'],  // Locrian
};
const CHARACTERISTIC_CHORDS={};
Object.entries(CHARACTERISTIC_CHORD_DEFS).forEach(([modeIdx,rns])=>{
  CHARACTERISTIC_CHORDS[parseInt(modeIdx)]=new Set(rns.map(parseRomanDegree));
});

let selectedRoot=0, selectedMode=0;

function isDark(){return false;} // site-wide dark mode not implemented yet

function rc(){
  const d=isDark();
  return{
    major:d?'#2d5fa0':'#378ADD', minor:d?'#7b4e9e':'#7F77DD',
    dim:d?'#8a4a3a':'#D85A30',   aug:d?'#7a6a00':'#B8960A',
    chromOuter:d?'#1e1e1a':'#e0deda',
    diaNote:d?'#1a3a24':'#eaf3de', chromNote:d?'#222220':'#f1efe8', rootNote:d?'#3a3010':'#faeeda',
    diaSol:d?'#0e2618':'#c0dd97',  chromSol:d?'#1a1a16':'#e8e6e0',  rootSol:d?'#2e2608':'#FAC775',
    stroke:d?'rgba(255,255,255,0.11)':'rgba(0,0,0,0.12)',
    onColored:'#f0eeea', onAug:d?'#f5e87a':'#2a2000',
    charGold:'#FFD700',
    noteText:d?'#c0dd97':'#3B6D11', rootNoteText:d?'#FAC775':'#BA7517', chromNoteText:d?'#7a7870':'#888780',
    solText:d?'#5DCAA5':'#0F6E56',  rootSolText:d?'#EF9F27':'#854F0B',
    centerText:d?'#c2c0b6':'#3d3d3a', centerBg:d?'#141412':'#f8f6f0',
    centerWarn:d?'#f08080':'#cc2222', toggleHint:d?'#5a5852':'#aaa8a0',
    canvasBg:d?'#1a1a18':'#f7f4ef',
  };
}

function sliceAngles(i){const step=(2*Math.PI)/12,off=-Math.PI/2-step/2;return{start:off+i*step,end:off+(i+1)*step,mid:off+(i+0.5)*step};}
function drawSector(r_o,r_i,a_s,a_e,fill,stroke){
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(CX,CY,r_o,a_s,a_e);ctx.arc(CX,CY,r_i,a_e,a_s,true);
  ctx.closePath();ctx.fillStyle=fill;ctx.fill();
  if(stroke){ctx.strokeStyle=stroke;ctx.lineWidth=0.75;ctx.stroke();}
}
function spt(r,a){return{x:CX+r*Math.cos(a),y:CY+r*Math.sin(a)};}
function drawText(txt,x,y,size,color,weight){
  ctx.font=`${weight||'400'} ${size}px "Anthropic Sans",system-ui,sans-serif`;
  ctx.fillStyle=color;ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.textBaseline='middle';ctx.fillText(txt,x,y);
}
function diatonicSet(){const rc2=FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA[selectedRoot];return MODES[selectedMode].steps.map(s=>(rc2+s)%12);}
function getQualities(){return MODES[selectedMode].harmonic?HARM_MIN_QUALITIES:MODES[selectedMode].qualities;}

function draw(){
  const c=rc(); ctx.fillStyle=c.canvasBg; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,W);
  const dia=diatonicSet(),quals=getQualities(),solSet=MODE_SOLFEGE[selectedMode];
  const charSet=CHARACTERISTIC_CHORDS[selectedMode]||new Set();

  for(let i=0;i<12;i++){
    const{start,end,mid}=sliceAngles(i);
    const noteC=FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA[i],isDia=dia.includes(noteC),isRoot=i===selectedRoot;
    const diaStep=dia.indexOf(noteC);

    // Outer ring
    let oFill=c.chromOuter,oTxt=c.onColored;
    if(isDia){const q=quals[diaStep];if(q==='M')oFill=c.major;else if(q==='m')oFill=c.minor;else if(q==='aug'){oFill=c.aug;oTxt=c.onAug;}else oFill=c.dim;}
    drawSector(R_OUTER_O,R_OUTER_I,start,end,oFill,c.stroke);
    if(isDia){
      const q=quals[diaStep],base=ROMAN[diaStep];
      const lbl=q==='M'?base:q==='m'?base.toLowerCase():q==='aug'?base+'+':base.toLowerCase()+'°';
      const isChar=charSet.has(diaStep);
      const pt=spt((R_OUTER_O+R_OUTER_I)/2,mid);
      drawText(lbl,pt.x,pt.y,isChar?18:14,isChar?c.charGold:oTxt,'500');
    }

    // Mid ring
    const nFill=isRoot?c.rootNote:(isDia?c.diaNote:c.chromNote);
    drawSector(R_MID_O,R_MID_I,start,end,nFill,c.stroke);
    const nCol=isRoot?c.rootNoteText:(isDia?c.noteText:c.chromNoteText);
    const dn=getRingDisplayName(i),pt_m=spt((R_MID_O+R_MID_I)/2,mid);
    if(isRoot&&hasTwoSpellings(i)){
      const altIdx=toggleState[i]===0?FIFTHS_TO_EXT[i].flat:FIFTHS_TO_EXT[i].sharp;
      drawText(dn,pt_m.x,pt_m.y-5,14,nCol,'500');
      drawText(EXT_LINE[altIdx].name,pt_m.x,pt_m.y+8,9,c.toggleHint,'400');
    } else {
      drawText(dn,pt_m.x,pt_m.y,isRoot?14:13,nCol,isRoot?'500':'400');
    }

    // Solfège ring
    const sFill=isRoot?c.rootSol:(isDia?c.diaSol:c.chromSol);
    drawSector(R_SOL_O,R_SOL_I,start,end,sFill,c.stroke);
    if(isDia){
      const syl=solSet[diaStep],sCol=isRoot?c.rootSolText:c.solText;
      const pt_s=spt((R_SOL_O+R_SOL_I)/2,mid);
      drawText(syl,pt_s.x,pt_s.y,isRoot?13:11,sCol,isRoot?'500':'400');
    }
  }

  // Center key sig
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(CX,CY,R_SOL_I-4,0,2*Math.PI);
  ctx.fillStyle=c.centerBg;ctx.fill();ctx.strokeStyle=c.stroke;ctx.lineWidth=0.75;ctx.stroke();
  const ksl=keySigLabel(),ksColor=Math.abs(keySigValue())>7?c.centerWarn:c.centerText;
  drawText(ksl,CX,CY,ksl.length>2?13:16,ksColor,'500');
}

const modeSelect=document.getElementById('mode-select');
const minorSelect=document.getElementById('minor-mode');
const rightPanel=document.getElementById('right-panel');
const LA_MODES=new Set([5,6]);
function syncUI(){
  modeSelect.value=LA_MODES.has(selectedMode)?'5':String(selectedMode);
  minorSelect.value=String(selectedMode);
  rightPanel.classList.toggle('visible',LA_MODES.has(selectedMode));
}
modeSelect.addEventListener('change',()=>{
  const val=parseInt(modeSelect.value);
  selectedMode=TONIC_GROUPS[MODES[val].tonic][0];
  syncUI();draw();
});
minorSelect.addEventListener('change',()=>{selectedMode=parseInt(minorSelect.value);syncUI();draw();});

canvas.addEventListener('click',e=>{
  const rect=canvas.getBoundingClientRect(),sc2=CSS_SIZE/rect.width;
  const mx=(e.clientX-rect.left)*sc2-CX,my=(e.clientY-rect.top)*sc2-CY;
  const dist=Math.sqrt(mx*mx+my*my);
  if(dist<R_SOL_I||dist>R_OUTER_O)return;
  let angle=Math.atan2(my,mx)+Math.PI/2+Math.PI/12;
  if(angle<0)angle+=2*Math.PI;if(angle>=2*Math.PI)angle-=2*Math.PI;
  const i=Math.floor(angle/(2*Math.PI/12))%12;
  if(dist>=R_OUTER_I)return;
  if(dist<R_MID_I){
    const dia=diatonicSet(),noteC=FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA[i];
    if(dia.includes(noteC)){resolveTonicClick(MODE_SOLFEGE[selectedMode][dia.indexOf(noteC)]);syncUI();draw();}
    return;
  }
  if(i===selectedRoot){if(hasTwoSpellings(i)){toggleState[i]=1-toggleState[i];draw();}return;}
  lockSpelling(i);selectedRoot=i;draw();
});

syncUI();
resizeCanvas();
new ResizeObserver(resizeCanvas).observe(canvas.parentElement);
watchZoom();
</script>
</div><div style="display: block; opacity: 1; color-scheme: light;"></div>
<script src="/apps/shared/tonality.js?v=4"></script>
<script>
(function(){
  // The circle's selectedRoot chroma is the MODE TONIC (= resting tone). Consume the
  // shared tonality (always CONCERT) + add Concert Key / Transposition / Transposed Key
  // menus. Transposition is local to this tool (not the shared instrument store) — it's
  // just a written-pitch lens on top of the same concert pitch; the wheel itself always
  // operates in concert pitch.
  if (typeof FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA === "undefined" || typeof draw !== "function" || typeof MODES === "undefined") return;
  var C_MODE = {maj:0,major:0,ion:0,ionian:0, m:6,min:6,minor:6, aeo:5,aeolian:5, dor:1,dorian:1, phr:2,phrygian:2, lyd:3,lydian:3, mix:4,mixolydian:4, loc:7,locrian:7};
  var OUR_MODE = {0:"maj",1:"dor",2:"phr",3:"lyd",4:"mix",5:"m",6:"m",7:"loc"};
  var NAMES=["C","D♭","D","E♭","E","F","G♭","G","A♭","A","B♭","B"];
  // Written-transpose semitone offsets from concert pitch (mod 12).
  var TRANSPOSITIONS=[{value:0,label:"Concert pitch"},{value:2,label:"B♭"},{value:9,label:"E♭"},{value:7,label:"F"}];
  var applying=false;

  // Fold key/transposition controls into the control rail, matching the Tonality/Minor-type
  // panels. Transposed Key is prepended first so it reads as the far-left/topmost control
  // whenever it's shown.
  var rail=document.getElementById("cof-rail");
  if(rail){ var keyGroup=document.createElement("div"); keyGroup.id="cof-keybar";
    keyGroup.style.cssText="display:contents";
    var transOptions=TRANSPOSITIONS.map(function(t){ return '<option value="'+t.value+'">'+t.label+'</option>'; }).join('');
    keyGroup.innerHTML='<div class="side-panel" id="cofTransWrap" style="display:none"><label for="cofTrans" id="cofTransLbl">Transposed Key</label><select id="cofTrans"></select></div>'+
      '<div class="side-panel" id="cof-concert-panel"><label for="cofConcert">Concert Key</label><select id="cofConcert"></select></div>'+
      '<div class="side-panel" id="cof-view-panel"><label for="cofView">Transposition</label><select id="cofView">'+transOptions+'</select></div>';
    rail.insertBefore(keyGroup, rail.firstChild); }
  var cSel=document.getElementById("cofConcert"), tSel=document.getElementById("cofTrans"),
      tWrap=document.getElementById("cofTransWrap"), tLbl=document.getElementById("cofTransLbl"), vSel=document.getElementById("cofView");
  if(cSel){ var h=""; for(var pc=0;pc<12;pc++) h+='<option value="'+pc+'">'+NAMES[pc]+'</option>'; cSel.innerHTML=h; }

  function transSemis(){ return parseInt(vSel && vSel.value, 10) || 0; }
  function transLabel(){ var v=transSemis(); var t=TRANSPOSITIONS.filter(function(t){return t.value===v;})[0]; return t?t.label:""; }

  function publish(){
    if(applying) return;
    try{
      var displayChroma = FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA[selectedRoot];      // wheel shows the WRITTEN/transposed pitch
      var resting = ((displayChroma - transSemis())%12+12)%12; // shared store always holds CONCERT
      var off = MODES[selectedMode].fifthsOffset;
      var doPc = (((resting + off*7) % 12) + 12) % 12;
      Tonality.setAll(doPc, resting, OUR_MODE[selectedMode], "local");
    }catch(e){}
    syncBar();
  }
  var _draw = draw;
  draw = function(){ var r = _draw.apply(this, arguments); publish(); return r; };
  function applyTonality(st){
    if (!st || st.resting == null){ syncBar(); return; }
    var m = C_MODE[st.mode] != null ? C_MODE[st.mode] : 0;
    var displayChroma = ((st.resting + transSemis())%12+12)%12; // concert → written, for the wheel
    var i = FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA.indexOf(displayChroma);
    if (i < 0 || (selectedRoot === i && selectedMode === m)){ syncBar(); return; }
    applying=true; selectedRoot = i; selectedMode = m;
    try { if (typeof lockSpelling === "function") lockSpelling(i); } catch(e){}
    try { if (typeof syncUI === "function") syncUI(); } catch(e){}
    applying=false; draw();
  }
  function syncBar(){
    var rest = Tonality.getResting(); if(rest==null) return; var ts=transSemis();
    if(cSel) cSel.value=String(rest);
    if(tWrap) tWrap.style.display = ts ? "" : "none";
    if(ts && tSel){ if(tLbl) tLbl.textContent="Transposed Key ("+transLabel()+")";
      var h=""; for(var pc=0;pc<12;pc++) h+='<option value="'+pc+'">'+NAMES[pc]+'</option>'; tSel.innerHTML=h; tSel.value=String((rest+ts)%12); }
  }
  function curSt(){ return { do: Tonality.getDo(), resting: Tonality.getResting(), mode: Tonality.getMode() }; }
  function pick(restPc){ var mode=Tonality.getMode()||"maj"; var mi=C_MODE[mode]!=null?C_MODE[mode]:0;
    var off=MODES[mi].fifthsOffset; var doPc=(((restPc+off*7)%12)+12)%12; Tonality.setAll(doPc, restPc, mode, "local"); applyTonality(curSt()); }
  if(cSel) cSel.addEventListener("change", function(){ pick(parseInt(cSel.value,10)||0); });
  if(tSel) tSel.addEventListener("change", function(){ var written=parseInt(tSel.value,10)||0; pick(((written-transSemis())%12+12)%12); });
  if(vSel) vSel.addEventListener("change", function(){ applyTonality(curSt()); });

  if (curSt().resting != null) applyTonality(curSt()); else publish();
  syncBar();
  Tonality.onChange(function(st, src){ if (src !== "local") applyTonality(st); else syncBar(); });
})();
</script>
<script src="/apps/shared/audio.js?v=3"></script>
<script>
(function(){
  // Click a roman numeral / diatonic chord wedge → play that chord (instead of
  // re-tonicizing). Capture-phase so it runs before the tool's own click handler.
  if (typeof FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA === "undefined" || !window.MusicAudio) return;
  var c = document.getElementById("cof-canvas"); if (!c) return;
  c.addEventListener("click", function(e){
    var rect = c.getBoundingClientRect(), sc = CSS_SIZE / rect.width;
    var mx = (e.clientX-rect.left)*sc - CX, my = (e.clientY-rect.top)*sc - CY;
    var dist = Math.sqrt(mx*mx + my*my);
    if (dist < R_OUTER_I || dist > R_OUTER_O) return;       // only the OUTER ring (roman numerals)
    var angle = Math.atan2(my,mx) + Math.PI/2 + Math.PI/12;
    if (angle < 0) angle += 2*Math.PI; if (angle >= 2*Math.PI) angle -= 2*Math.PI;
    var i = Math.floor(angle/(2*Math.PI/12)) % 12;
    var dia = diatonicSet(), noteC = FIFTHS_TO_CHROMA[i], step = dia.indexOf(noteC);
    if (step < 0) return;
    var q = getQualities()[step];
    var iv = q==="m" ? [0,3,7] : q==="d" ? [0,3,6] : (q==="aug"||q==="+") ? [0,4,8] : [0,4,7];
    // The wheel shows the WRITTEN/transposed pitch; audio must sound the CONCERT pitch.
    var transSel = document.getElementById("cofView");
    var ts = transSel ? (parseInt(transSel.value,10)||0) : 0;
    var soundingC = ((noteC - ts) % 12 + 12) % 12;
    var base = 60 + soundingC;
    window.MusicAudio.chord(iv.map(function(x){ return base + x; }), 1.1);
    e.stopImmediatePropagation();
  }, true);
})();
</script>
<script src="/apps/shared/establish-button.js"></script>
```
